title: OpenStax Business Ethics
description: A source card for the OpenStax Business Ethics textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Business Ethics introduces ethical frameworks, corporate responsibility, stakeholders, workplace ethics, diversity, globalization, sustainability, and professional decision-making.
Use this source for applied argument writing where students evaluate choices, tradeoffs, duties, consequences, and evidence in realistic scenarios.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters, figures, or ancillary materials.
